data.title: Bitcoin News: Retails Hold Keys, Institutions Beg for Crumbs
data.description:
In latest Bitcoin news spotlight, a trillion dollars flows daily, yet Wall Street giants—banks, hedge funds, and sovereign wealth funds—scramble for leftovers. That’s Bitcoin right now in 2025. It’s hit a wild milestone: the first asset over a trillion bucks that’s mostly owned by regular folks like you and me. The numbers don’t lie—retail investors […]
The post Bitcoin News: Retails Hold...
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/02/22/bitcoin-news-retails-hold-keys-institutions-beg-for-crumbs/

data.title: Dogecoin Whales Go On A 110-Million Memecoin Buying Spree—What’s Next For DOGE?
data.description:
Dogecoin whales have executed a substantial transaction in the last two days, purchasing 110 million DOGE while the price of the meme coin declined. This systematic accumulation has attracted the interest of experts and traders, igniting discussions regarding a possible price reversal. With DOGE presently trading at $0.25, many are speculating whether this may indicate a forthcoming bullish...
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/altcoin/dogecoin-whales-go-on-a-110-million-memecoin-buying-spree-whats-next-for-doge/

data.title: Asteroid's Earth Impact Odds Plummet, Scientists Now Playing the Long Wait Game
data.description:
Latest observations slash collision probability for asteroid 2024 YR4 from 2.8% to 0.16%, but no further updates are possible until 2028.
source: https://decrypt.co/307310/asteroids-earth-impact-odds-plummet

data.title: CZ donation address bought 1.005 BNB TST twice in the past 5 minutes
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Ai Yi, an analyst on the chain, CZ's donation address bought 1.005 BNB of TST twice in the past 5 minutes, worth $662. Market data shows that TST has soared 40% in a short period of time, and its market value has exceeded $100 million again, now reporting $118 million. 
Previously, the transaction failed when CZ's address bought TST for the first time.

data.title: Lazarus Strikes Again? $1.4B Bybit Hack Rocks Crypto as Exchange Scrambles for 63K ETH Loan
data.description:
"Lazarus Strikes Again? A staggering $1.4 billion hack on Bybit shakes the cryptocurrency world, as the exchange urgently seeks a loan of 63,000 ETH to stabilize its operations and recover from this massive breach."
source: https://voiceofcrypto.online/latest-news/lazarus-strikes-again-14b-bybit-hack-rocks-crypto-as-exchange-scrambles-for-63k-eth-loan

data.title: Ethereum dominates RWAs with $4.1B in AUM value and 54.5% market share
data.description:
Ethereum emerged top of the real-world assets table as the total value of assets under management grew by 10% in the past 30 days to $4.1B. Ethereum's RWA market share also went up 3.39% to 54.5% as the number of RWA holders in the ecosystem increased 3.05% to 62.28K.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/ethereum-dominates-rwas-with-4-1b/

data.title: DWF Labs deposited 2,200 ETH to Bybit 1 hour ago, equivalent to $6.02 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Lookonchain monitoring, DWF Labs deposited 2,200 ETH, equivalent to approximately US$6.02 million, into Bybit 1 hour ago.

data.title: In the past 12 hours, the entire network has blown up more than 50 million US dollars, mainly short orders
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Coinglass market data shows that in the past 12 hours, the entire network has a liquidation of 54.2434 million US dollars, of which long orders have a liquidation of 14.909 million US dollars and short orders have a liquidation of 39.3343 million US dollars.

data.title: US Household Debt Shatters $18,040,000,000,000 As Delinquency Rates Surge, According To Federal Reserve Bank of New York
data.description:
The total amount of household debt in the US has surged to a new record level. In its Quarterly Report on Household Debt and Credit, the New York Fed says total household debt hit a 21-year high of $18.04 trillion at the end of Q4 2024. That’s an increase of $93 billion on a quarter-on-quarter […]
The post US Household Debt Shatters $18,040,000,000,000 As Delinquency Rates Surge, According To...
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/02/22/us-household-debt-shatters-18040000000000-as-delinquency-rates-surge-according-to-federal-reserve-bank-of-new-york/
